summary: Stable doctrine should be cached, hot operational state should refresh every score cycle, and cold audit history should be compacted unless explicitly requested.

stable.name: stable
stable.summary: Canonical identity and doctrine surfaces; cache aggressively.

hot.name: hot
hot.summary: Current execution state and founder-facing intelligence; refresh every cycle.

cold.name: cold
cold.summary: Historical audits and long-tail artifacts; compact by default and fetch on demand.
